title: IMTECH Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Research Fellow Posts
description: Institute of Microbial Technology (IMTECH Chandigarh) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill the Senior Research Fellow position. Those candidates who have qualified in the M.Sc, M.E/ M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, M.V.Sc, MD/ MS, and B.Pharm can grab this chance and apply for the IMTECH Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more...
